title: Mines and Minerals Development (Mining Rights and Non-Mining Rights) Order, 2010

sections.heading: 2. The Second Schedule to the Act is amended in paragraph Amendment
sections.text:
2 - of Second
Schedule
(a) by the deletion, in subparagraph (1) of the words "within
a period of two years from the commencement to this
Act" and the substitution therefor of the words "by
30th September, 2010"; and
(b) by the deletion in subparagraph (2), of the words "two
years after the commencement of this Act" and the
substitution therefor oft he words "after 30th September,
2010".

sections.heading: The Mines and Minerals Development (Mining Rights and Revocation
sections.text:
ofS.I. No.
Non-Mining Rights) Order, 2009, is hereby revoked.
27 of2009
M. MWALE,
Minister of Mines and
Minerals Development
LUSAKA
31stMarch, 2010
[MMMD/5/7/1]
Copies of this Statutory Instrument can be obtainedf rom the Government Printer,
